evals.prompt: Set up my new class ANTH 2A at Foothill — syllabus attached.
evals.expected_output: Reads vault CLAUDE.md + template; scaffolds schoolwork/anth2a/ with notes/problem-sets/exams/research + _context_anth2a.md (tag course/anth2a); links it from Home.md; ingests the syllabus into the context file (instructor, grading, calendar, links), marking unknowns _TBD_; offers to add deadlines to the calendar and build study materials.

evals.prompt: Make a practice quiz for week 1 of Math 1C from the lecture slides.
evals.expected_output: Original problems grounded in the uploaded slides, mirroring course scope/difficulty; Obsidian LaTeX ($...$) with balanced delimiters; saved as a note in problem-sets/ or exams/ with frontmatter + a wikilink to _context_math1c.md; solutions at the requested depth; no submittable graded answers.

evals.prompt: Put my Math 1C exam dates on my calendar.
evals.expected_output: Creates events for firm dates (e.g., the Finale) with an explicit timeZone and a stated PT/ET assumption; creates clearly-labeled placeholders for week-only dates (LC I/LC II) and tells the user to confirm on Canvas; adds reminders + a consistent color; reports what was added and what needs confirming.

evals.prompt: Build me a practice exam that mirrors the sample Knowledge Check.
evals.expected_output: Uses the uploaded sample exam as a blueprint (section structure, question types, difficulty); original problems; produced as a clean exam with a separate answer key; saved to exams/ and linked from the course context; respects the AI policy (practice only).
